title: AI Image
description: Create and edit images with AI. Supports OpenAI (GPT Image, DALL-E), Together AI, and other compatible providers.

operations.name: create
operations.title: Create Image
operations.description: Create an image from a text prompt. Returns the generated image as a file.

prompt.description: Text description of the image to create

size.description: Image size (model-dependent, see tool description for supported sizes)

operations.name: edit
operations.title: Edit Image
operations.description: Edit an existing image based on a text prompt.

prompt.description: Text description of the desired edit

image.description: URL or base64-encoded input image. You can pass a file URL from a previous create result.

size.description: Output image size (model-dependent, see tool description for supported sizes)

metadata.modelCapabilities:
Configured model: {{model}}
Model capabilities:
- gpt-image-1: sizes [1024x1024, 1024x1536, 1536x1024, auto], supports edit
- dall-e-3: sizes [1024x1024, 1024x1792, 1792x1024], does NOT support edit
- dall-e-2: sizes [256x256, 512x512, 1024x1024], supports edit
IMPORTANT: Only use sizes supported by the configured model. Invalid sizes will cause an error.

setupGuide:
1. **domain** — Your API provider's base URL:
   - OpenAI: `https://api.openai.com`
   - Together AI: `https://api.together.xyz`

2. **accessToken** — Your API key from the provider

3. **model** — The image generation model ID:
   - `gpt-image-1` — OpenAI's latest image model (sizes: 1024x1024, 1024x1536, 1536x1024, auto)
   - `dall-e-3` — DALL-E 3 (sizes: 1024x1024, 1024x1792, 1792x1024, no edit support)
   - `dall-e-2` — DALL-E 2 (sizes: 256x256, 512x512, 1024x1024)
